## Tags
square, pathfinder, path, intersect, shape, include, vector

## Categories
design

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/squares-intersect)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SquaresIntersect;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SquaresIntersect { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
